data.title: Metaplanet’s current BTC holdings account for 0.01% of the total supply
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese listed company Metaplanet stated that its current BTC holdings account for 0.01% of the total supply.

data.title: Crypto market sectors generally rose, with PayFi leading the way with a 5.21% gain, and AI Agents falling back for two consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 20, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sectors generally rose, with the PayFi sector leading the rise by 5.21%. Within the sector, XRP was affected by factors such as Trump sharing related articles on Truth Social, and the 24-hour increase was 5.78%, and Stellar (XLM) rose by 3.90%. The AI ​​sector rebounded, rising 3.52% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Bittensor (TAO) rose 15.61%, and Golem (GLM) rose 16.16%. However, AI Agents, the AI ​​sub-sector, fell 2.68%, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) fell 3.21%, and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 8.72%.
In terms of other sectors, the Layer1 sector rose by 1.68% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Cardano (ADA) rose by 4.09%, Sui (SUI) rose by 4.65%, and Aptos (APT) rose by 14.21%; the DeFi sector rose by 1.22%, the Layer2 sector rose by 1.20%, the Meme sector rose by 1.15%, and the CeFi sector rose by 0.85%.

data.title: Nexus Faces Challenges Amid Increased Requests And DoS Attacks
data.description: According to Odaily, Nexus has announced on X that its Nexus Orchestrator is currently dealing with a surge in requests and denial-of-service (DoS) attacks. The team is actively working to maintain network stability and has urged users to stay updated on further developments.

data.title: Walrus will launch the mainnet in March and launch WAL tokens: a total of 5 billion, 10% for Walrus User Drop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Decentralized storage and data availability protocol Walrus announced on X that the mainnet will be launched in March and the native token WAL will be launched. The total supply is 5 billion, 10% of which will be allocated to Walrus User Drop, of which 4% will be used for initial airdrops and 6% for future distributions.

data.title: Kaito Futures Trade At $1.3693 On Aevo With Significant Volume
data.description: According to BlockBeats, as of February 20, Kaito futures on the Aevo platform are currently priced at $1.3693. The 24-hour trading volume for these futures has reached $271,300.

data.title: AVE.AI completes Binance Wallet integration
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, AVE.AI completed the access to Binance Wallet on February 20.
A relevant person in charge of AVE said: "By connecting to Binance Wallet, AVE users, especially BSC users, can improve the on-chain trading experience, better connect to the BSC ecosystem, and better meet the growing BSC Meme market demand."
It is reported that AVE recently connected to the BSC ecological internal disk launch platform and supported external disk Meme, and established a one-stop experience for BSC Meme transactions. At present, AVE supports more than 40 portrait dimensions and market signals, and App, trading robots and PC terminals support multiple major ecological chain markets and transactions such as BNBChain, Solana and Ethereum.

data.title: BitMart will list PAIN (PAIN)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch PAIN (PAIN) at 12:00 (Eastern Time) on February 19, and the PAIN/USDT trading pair will be opened. PAIN is the Meme coin on the Solana chain.

data.title: Nexus Orchestrator is dealing with a high volume of requests and DoS attacks, the team is working to keep the network open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nexus posted on X that Nexus Orchestrator is dealing with a large number of requests and DoS attacks. The team is doing its best to keep the network open. Please stay tuned for further progress.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 97,000 USDT with a 1.27% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 20, 2025, 02:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 97,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 97,030.5 USDT, with a narrowed 1.27% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bithumb will launch KAITO Korean Won trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bithumb is about to launch the KAITO Korean won trading pair, and the trading start time is to be determined.
